records.ety: [L. compartiri; com- + partiri, partire to share, pars, partis, part, share: cf. OF. compartir. See Part, v. t.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Comparted; p. pr. & vb. n. Comparting.]

defs: To divide; to mark out into parts or subdivisions.
quotes: The crystal surface is comparted all In niches verged with rubies.
